name: Plex Systems Smart Manufacturing Platform API
what_it_does: Plex Systems REST API for cloud-based Smart Manufacturing Platform (MES + ERP). Enables AI agents to manage production execution and work order tracking, handle quality management and inspection workflows, access inventory and material tracking data, retrieve supply chain and supplier portal data, manage time and attendance and labor tracking, handle equipment maintenance and downtime tracking, access statistical process control (SPC) data, retrieve OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) analytics, manage shipping and receiving workflows, and integrate manufacturing data with ERP, WMS, and IoT platforms.
use_cases: Managing production execution and work orders from manufacturing automation agents
Handling quality inspection and SPC data from quality management agents
Accessing OEE and equipment analytics from manufacturing intelligence agents
Integrating MES data with ERP and IoT from smart factory automation agents
not_for: Non-manufacturing businesses without production and MES requirements
Small job shops without cloud-native MES investment
Process manufacturing without discrete manufacturing focus
best_when: A discrete manufacturer (automotive, aerospace, food & beverage) using Plex Systems wants AI agents to automate production execution, quality management, OEE tracking, labor management, and supply chain integration.
avoid_when: OPERATIONAL RISK: MES directly controls production floor workflows — automated work order changes and quality holds can stop production lines. Quality data automation must prevent defective products from advancing. Labor tracking automation affects payroll and compliance.

auth.notes: Plex uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Company and plant-level credentials with production, quality, and supply chain scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for production and quality events. Rockwell Automation acquisition (2021, $2.2B) enables deep OT/IT convergence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — cloud MES/ERP subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and module subscription; enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Troy, Michigan. Acquired by Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK) in 2021 for $2.2B. Founded 2001. Pioneer cloud-native MES/ERP for manufacturing. 800+ manufacturers, 8M+ part numbers managed. Strong automotive, food & beverage, and aerospace verticals. Deep Rockwell Automation FactoryTalk integration. Competes with Epicor and Infor for cloud manufacturing ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; enterprise SLA available

known_agent_gotchas: OPERATIONAL RISK: MES directly controls production floor — automated work order changes can halt production lines
Quality hold automation must prevent defective products from shipping — errors have regulatory implications
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Rockwell Automation OT/IT integration — may require coordination with plant floor control systems
ITAR compliance for aerospace/defense customers — export control requirements for certain data
Plant-level permissions — API access typically scoped to specific manufacturing facilities
agent_readiness.security_notes: Manufacturing execution and production data. SOC2, ISO27001, ITAR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Production floor control sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: MES and production data. SOC2, ISO27001, ITAR. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Production floor and quality data.
